message:
fix(ci): Windows find paths + macOS stack limit in security tests

- e2e_tools: Use contains() instead of starts_with() for
  find_directory_suffix assertion — fd on Windows returns absolute
  paths with //?/ prefix instead of relative paths.

- security_budgets: Bump stack limits from 32-64KB to 256KB for
  stack overflow tests. Bridge JS initialization needs >64KB on
  macOS ARM64 (larger stack frames), causing runtime creation to
  fail before the test can run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
